title: My Missions for Southampton Itchen. - Darren Paffey MP
meta_description: Your local voice for Southampton Itchen
text_excerpt: My Missions for Southampton Itchen. - Darren Paffey MP Skip to main content Join Get Involved Donate About My story My Missions for Southampton Itchen. My Campaigns Have your say on £20m funding for Weston Bring a Neighbourhood Health Centre to Bitterne Bring Back Local Banking! Step-Free Access at Woolston Train Station More Bobbies on the Beat End the Cladding & Leasehold Scandal Bathing Water Status for the River Itchen Latest News Parliamentary Activity Get in Touch Contact Me Invite Darren to Your Event Upcoming Events SEND Parent & Carer Coffee Morning Town Hall Q&A with Darren Paffey MP Advice Surgeries Pint with your MP Southampton Action Forums Newsletter Sign Up More Search Search the website Search Menu My Missions for Southampton Itchen. Mission One: Supporting local people with the cost of living. Mission Two: Reduce crime in our city with community officers on our streets. Mission Three: Make our local NHS fit for the future - so you can see a GP within 48 hours. Mission Four: Help Southampton schools get the investment they need. Mission Five: Clean up the river itchen from pollution and protect the environment.
